mapper.select:
SELECT r.request_id AS id, u.real_name AS studentName, si.student_number AS studentId, o.org_name AS collegeName, cu.real_name AS counselorName, r.request_reason AS requestReason, r.proposed_sessions AS proposedSessions, r.request_status AS requestStatus, CASE r.request_status WHEN 'PENDING' THEN '待审批' WHEN 'APPROVED' THEN '已批准' WHEN 'REJECTED' THEN '已拒绝' ELSE '未知' END AS statusText, r.approved_sessions AS approvedSessions, r.approved_frequency AS approvedFrequency, DATE_FORMAT(r.start_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS startDate, DATE_FORMAT(r.end_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS endDate, DATE_FORMAT(r.created_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS createdAt FROM long_term_consultation_request r JOIN student_info si ON r.student_id = si.student_id JOIN user u ON si.user_id = u.user_id LEFT JOIN organization o ON si.college_id = o.org_id LEFT JOIN counselor_info c ON r.counselor_id = c.counselor_id LEFT JOIN user cu ON c.counselor_id = cu.user_id
AND (u.real_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR si.student_number LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
AND r.request_status = #{approvalStatus}
ORDER BY r.created_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE long_term_consultation_request SET request_status = 'APPROVED', approver_id = #{approverId}, approval_notes = #{comment}, approved_sessions = #{approvedSessions}, approved_frequency = #{approvedFrequency}, start_date = #{startDate}, end_date = #{endDate}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE request_id = #{id}
UPDATE long_term_consultation_request SET request_status = 'REJECTED', approver_id = #{approverId}, approval_notes = #{comment}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE request_id = #{id}
